channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Schecter Omen Extreme-5 LH bass in Black Cherry — $749
item.description:
$749 · Brand New · LV Guitars

Schecter Omen Extreme-5 Left-Handed Electric Bass in Black Cherry Finish

The Omen Extreme-5 LH delivers a comfortable, balanced playing experience tailored for left-handed bassists. Its thin 'C' neck profile and extended 35" scale combine with a flamed maple top and mahogany body to create an instrument that feels refined without sacrificing the aggressive character Schecter built into this line. Black chrome hardware and abalone inlays accent a Black Cherry finish that demands attention on any stage.

Playability & Feel

The thin 'C' neck measures .787" at the first fret and .866" at the twelfth, providing an approachable grip for extended sessions. 24 X-Jumbo frets on a 16" radius rosewood fretboard paired with a Graph Tech XL Black Tusq nut (1.771" width) ensure smooth playability and clean note definition across the extended 35" scale—standard for modern 5-string bass work.

Tone & Electronics

Dual Schecter Diamond Bass pickups (bridge and neck positions) deliver the focused, articulate voice this instrument is known for, with a 9-volt clip-in battery compartment powering the active preamp. The Diamond Bass bridge with 6 bolt-on construction transfers string vibration directly through the mahogany body and flamed maple top for maximum resonance.

Key Features
  • Left-handed configuration with 35" (889mm) scale length
  • Mahogany body with flamed maple top and arched contour
  • Crème multi-ply binding and black chrome hardware
  • 24 X-Jumbo frets on rosewood fretboard with 16" radius
  • Thin 'C' neck profile: .787" (1st fret) / .866" (12th fret)
  • Dual Schecter Diamond Bass pickups with active 2-band EQ
  • Graph Tech XL Black Tusq nut, 1.771" width
  • Schecter tuners with 2-way adjustable truss rod (5/32" Allen nut)
  • Metal knurled control knobs with set screws
  • 6 bolt-on construction for tonal clarity and sustain
  • Abalone & Pearloid Vector inlays
  • Includes Ernie Ball 5-String Super Long (.045–.130) strings

This Omen Extreme-5 represents serious hardware and construction at a player-friendly price point, delivering punchy tone and ergonomic design for left-handed bassists demanding both style and substance.

item.title: Schecter Hellraiser Extreme-5 Electric Bass Crimson Red Burst Satin B-Stock 1027 — $1,079.20
item.description:
$1,079.20 · B-Stock · LV Guitars

Schecter Hellraiser Extreme-5 Electric Bass Crimson Red Burst Satin B-Stock

The Hellraiser Extreme-5 delivers a slim, fast neck profile that cuts fatigue during extended playing sessions, while the neck-thru construction with Ultra Access ensures effortless reach to the upper frets. This B-stock unit features cosmetic flaws in the headstock area but maintains full structural and tonal integrity. The extended 35" scale and 24 X-Jumbo frets provide the articulation and sustain demanded by modern bass players.

Playability & Construction

The neck-thru design with mahogany body and quilted maple top yields solid sustain and resonance, while the Maple/Walnut multi-ply neck with ebony fretboard resists wear and delivers consistent response. The Thin 'C' neck shape (0.787" at the 1st fret, 0.866" at the 12th fret) paired with a 16" fretboard radius and 1.771" nut width accommodates both aggressive finger technique and smooth thumb positioning across the five strings.

Electronics & Tone

Dual EMG 40TW pickups feed a dedicated active 3-band EQ circuit with push-pull volume controls, delivering everything from tight lows to articulate highs with minimal noise. The 18-volt battery compartment with screw plate ensures stable power delivery and easy access for maintenance.

Key Features
  • Body Material: Mahogany with Quilted Maple top
  • Neck-Thru construction with Ultra Access
  • Maple/Walnut multi-ply neck with Thin 'C' profile
  • Ebony fretboard with MOP Gothic Cross inlays
  • 24 X-Jumbo frets on 35" (889mm) scale
  • Dual EMG 40TW pickups with active 3-band EQ
  • Graph Tech XL Black Tusq nut
  • Schecter Custom Bass String Thru bridge
  • Grover tuners with Black Chrome hardware
  • MOP binding with BLK/WHT/BLK multi-ply
  • 16" fretboard radius with 2-way adjustable truss rod
  • 18-volt battery compartment with screw plate

This Hellraiser Extreme-5 combines high-end hardware and active electronics in a platform built for speed and tonal range, with the B-stock discount reflecting cosmetic finish rather than any compromise in playability or sound.

This specific B-Stock unit features minor cosmetic imperfections typical of returned or display inventory. These marks are purely superficial and have absolutely zero impact on the playability, tone, or structural integrity of the bass. A premium Schecter Hellraiser Extreme-5 active bass is available at significant B-Stock savings with complete manufacturer warranty coverage.

item.title: Schecter C-4 GT Bass Natural B-Stock 0604 — $919.20
item.description:
$919.20 · B-Stock · LV Guitars

Schecter C-4 GT Bass Natural B-Stock

The Schecter C-4 GT delivers a thin, fast neck profile that sits comfortably in the hand with minimal effort required for extended playing sessions. This four-string bass balances responsive playability with a naturally warm tone, making it equally suited to session work and gigging musicians who demand both comfort and reliability. The B-stock condition means this instrument shows minor cosmetic wear but operates with full functionality.

Playability & Comfort

The thin "C" neck shape measures .787" at the first fret and .866" at the 12th fret, paired with a 34" scale and 16" fretboard radius for natural hand positioning. A Graph Tech Black Tusq XL nut at 1.496" width provides crisp string definition, while 24 Extra Jumbo frets on an ebony fretboard enable precise intonation and smooth legato work.

Tone & Electronics

Active EMG 35DC and 35P4 pickups deliver punchy lows and articulate midrange through a 2-band EMG EQ with master volume and blend controls. The 9-volt clip-in battery compartment powers the preamp for consistent output and tonal shaping across all frequency ranges.

Key Features
  • Mahogany body with flamed maple top and 1-ply black binding
  • 3-piece maple neck with thin "C" profile
  • 34" scale (863mm)
  • 24 Extra Jumbo frets on ebony fretboard
  • 16" fretboard radius (406mm)
  • EMG 35DC and 35P4 pickups with 2-band EMG EQ
  • Graph Tech Black Tusq XL nut at 1.496" width
  • Schecter Custom Bass Bridge with string-through design
  • 2-way adjustable truss rod with heel access spoke wheel
  • Offset/Reverse Roman Numeral inlays
  • Schecter tuners
  • Ernie Ball Super Long 4-String (.045–.105) included

The C-4 GT combines professional-grade electronics and hardware with a playable neck geometry, making it a capable instrument for session, live, and studio work.

item.title: Schecter Hellraiser Extreme-5 Left-Handed Bass B-Stock 1623 — $1,199
item.description:
$1,199 · B-Stock · LV Guitars

Schecter Hellraiser Extreme-5 Left-Handed Bass B-Stock 1623

This left-handed 5-string bass combines aggressive styling with serious playability, engineered for bassists who demand both speed and tone in a single instrument. The slim neck profile and 35" scale deliver responsive handling across extended sessions, while neck-thru construction locks in sustain and resonance. As a B-stock unit, it carries full factory specifications at a significant discount.

Playability & Construction

The thin 'C' neck profile measures .787" at the first fret and .866" at the 12th, engineered for speed and comfort. 24 X-Jumbo frets sit on a 16" radius Ebony fretboard with MOP Gothic Cross inlays, while the Graph Tech XL Black Tusq nut (1.771" width) ensures consistent string-to-fretboard contact and tuning stability across all five strings. Ultra Access body contours make upper-fret navigation effortless.

Tone & Electronics

Dual EMG 40TW active pickups deliver articulate, punchy tones with controlled midrange and extended low-end clarity—equally suited to fingerstyle precision and aggressive picking. The 18-volt active electronics provide extended headroom and dynamic range, while the Schecter Custom Bass String-Thru bridge with Black Chrome hardware locks in intonation and sustain.

Key Features
  • Neck-Thru construction with Ultra Access body contours
  • Mahogany body with Quilted Maple top
  • Maple/Walnut Multi-ply neck
  • Ebony fretboard with MOP Gothic Cross inlays
  • 35" scale (889mm) with 24 X-Jumbo frets on 16" radius
  • Graph Tech XL Black Tusq nut, 1.771" width
  • Dual EMG 40TW active pickups
  • 18-volt battery compartment with screw plate
  • 2-way adjustable truss rod
  • Grover tuners with Black Chrome hardware
  • Schecter Custom Bass String-Thru bridge
  • Crimson Red Burst Satin finish in left-handed configuration

The Hellraiser Extreme-5 combines professional-grade electronics, hardware, and playability in a left-handed configuration—a serious instrument for demanding bassists.

item.title: Schecter C-5 GT Bass Satin Trans Red B-Stock 0674 — $959.20
item.description:
$959.20 · B-Stock · LV Guitars

Schecter C-5 GT Bass Satin Trans Red B-Stock

The Schecter C-5 GT delivers a balanced, comfortable playing experience engineered for five-string bass demands. Its slim, fast neck profile and body contouring minimize fatigue during extended sessions while maintaining precise weight distribution, making this instrument equally at home in the hands of four-string converts or seasoned five-string players. As a B-stock unit, this bass offers full functionality and professional-grade construction at a significant discount.

Playability & Design

The fast, slim neck profile is specifically voiced to minimize finger fatigue and maximize reach across the fingerboard, while ergonomic body contouring and strategically positioned strap buttons ensure balanced weight distribution during standing play. Schecter's attention to intonation standards and body geometry delivers the precision expected from modern bass construction.

Tone & Electronics

Active electronics with an onboard preamp and precision-engineered pickups provide dynamic range and tonal clarity across genres—from tight low-end pocket work to articulate higher-register definition. The system delivers the flexibility serious bassists require for diverse playing styles.

Key Features
  • Five-string configuration with extended low B for modern tuning versatility
  • Satin Trans Red finish with refined, non-reflective aesthetic
  • Satin hardware for cohesive, understated appearance
  • Fast, slim neck profile designed for ergonomic playability
  • Active electronics with onboard preamp
  • Precision-engineered pickups for clarity and definition
  • Body contour design for comfortable playing posture
  • Balanced body geometry for weight distribution
  • Schecter build quality and intonation standards
  • B-stock condition—fully functional with possible minor cosmetic wear

The C-5 GT combines professional construction, versatile active electronics, and thoughtful ergonomic design in a package built for serious five-string players.

item.title: Schecter C-4 GT Bass Trans Blue B-Stock 2775 — $919.20
item.description:
$919.20 · B-Stock · LV Guitars

Schecter C-4 GT Bass Trans Blue B-Stock 2775

The Schecter C-4 GT is a compact, ergonomic four-string bass engineered for extended playing sessions without fatigue. Its ultrathin C-profile neck and balanced body geometry deliver responsive feel and fast playability, while the striking Trans Blue finish with Black Racing Stripe commands visual presence on any stage. B-stock condition indicates minor cosmetic imperfections that do not compromise playability or sonic performance.

Playability & Neck Design

The 3-piece maple neck with ultrathin C-profile reduces hand fatigue during demanding sessions, paired with a durable ebony fretboard for smooth note articulation. The 34" scale length maintains traditional bass proportions, with neck measurements of 0.787" at the 1st fret and 0.866" at the 12th fret creating a fast, comfortable playing platform.

Tone & Electronics

The dual EMG pickup configuration—EMG 40DC bridge and EMG 40P5 neck—delivers articulate, punchy tone with excellent definition across the frequency spectrum. The Schecter Custom Bass Bridge with string-through design enhances sustain and tonal clarity, supporting versatility from tight, percussive attack to warm, sustained lows.

Key Features
  • Mahogany body with flamed maple top
  • Satin Trans Blue finish with Black Racing Stripe Decal
  • 3-piece maple neck with ultrathin C-profile
  • Ebony fretboard
  • 34" scale length (864 MM)
  • Neck thickness: 0.787" @ 1st fret, 0.866" @ 12th fret
  • EMG 40DC bridge pickup and EMG 40P5 neck pickup
  • Schecter Custom Bass Bridge with string-through design
  • Schecter tuners
  • Offset/Reverse Roman Numeral inlays
  • 4-string configuration
  • Made in Indonesia

The C-4 GT combines premium tonewoods, responsive neck geometry, and professional-grade electronics into a road-ready instrument built to exacting specifications.

item.title: Schecter C-5 GT Bass Natural B-Stock 0909 — $959.20
item.description:
$959.20 · B-Stock · LV Guitars

Schecter C-5 GT Bass Natural B-Stock

The Schecter C-5 GT delivers modern ergonomics and articulate tone in a compact five-string package designed for working bassists. Its thin "C" neck profile and 35" scale combine responsive playability with extended low-end definition, making this B-stock example a value proposition for players seeking professional performance without compromise.

Playability & Feel

Set-neck construction with Ultra Access cutaway provides comfortable fret access across all 24 extra-jumbo frets, while the thin "C" profile (0.787" at the 1st fret, 0.866" at the 12th) maintains speed and precision during extended playing sessions. The 35" (889mm) scale combined with a Graph Tech Black Tusq XL nut and 16" radius ebony fretboard creates a bass that balances traditional feel with modern refinement.

Tone & Electronics

Dual EMG pickups—the EMG 40DC bridge and EMG 40P5 neck—deliver articulate, controlled output paired with a 2-band EMG EQ for essential tonal shaping. The Schecter Custom Bass Bridge with string-through design ensures maximum sustain and harmonic clarity across all five strings.

Key Features
  • Body: Mahogany with Flamed Maple top
  • Neck: 3-piece Maple set-neck construction with Ultra Access cutaway
  • Scale: 35" (889mm)
  • Fretboard: Ebony with 24 extra-jumbo frets, 16" radius
  • Neck Profile: Thin "C" (0.787" at 1st fret, 0.866" at 12th fret)
  • Bridge Pickup: EMG 40DC
  • Neck Pickup: EMG 40P5
  • Electronics: Volume/Blend/2-Band EMG EQ with 9-volt clip-in battery compartment
  • Bridge: Schecter Custom Bass Bridge with string-through design
  • Nut: Graph Tech Black Tusq XL (1.771" width)
  • Hardware: Black Schecter tuners
  • Inlays: Offset/Reverse Roman Numerals

This C-5 GT combines premium tonewoods, refined electronics, and professional hardware into a five-string bass equally capable in studio sessions and live settings.

item.title: Schecter C-5 GT Bass Satin Charcoal Burst B-Stock 0518 — $959.20
item.description:
$959.20 · B-Stock · LV Guitars

Schecter C-5 GT Bass Satin Charcoal Burst B-Stock

The C-5 GT delivers a comfortable, responsive playing experience built around a thin 'C' neck profile and 35" extended scale engineered for modern five-string bass work. Set-neck construction with Ultra Access upper-fret playability combines traditional tonal resonance with contemporary ergonomics, making this bass equally at home with fingerstyle precision or aggressive technique.

Playability & Construction

A mahogany body topped with flamed maple meets a 3-piece maple neck reinforced with carbon fiber rods, minimizing neck dive while maintaining structural stability. The ebony fingerboard fitted with 24 X-Jumbo frets and 16" radius accommodates both traditional fingerstyle and aggressive playing techniques without compromise.

Tone & Electronics

Dual EMG pickups—40DC bridge and 40P5 neck—deliver punchy, articulate lows with transparent midrange clarity through a 2-band active EQ offering master volume and blend controls. This configuration provides surgical tone-shaping capability across the extended five-string range, with professional-grade signal integrity maintained throughout extended playing sessions.

Key Features
  • Body: Mahogany with Flamed Maple top and Arched Top contour
  • Neck: 3-piece Maple with Carbon Fiber Reinforcement Rods, Thin 'C' profile
  • Fingerboard: Ebony with 24 X-Jumbo frets and 16" radius
  • Scale: 35" (889mm) extended scale for five-string bass
  • Pickups: EMG 40DC (bridge) and EMG 40P5 (neck)
  • Electronics: 2-Band active EQ with Master Volume/Blend control
  • Nut: Graph Tech XL Black Tusq, 1.771" width
  • Hardware: Schecter Custom Bass String-Through bridge with black hardware
  • Neck Thickness: .787" at 1st fret, .866" at 12th fret
  • Truss Rod: 2-Way adjustable with heel access spoke wheel
  • Inlays: Offset/Reverse Roman Numerals
  • Right-handed configuration, manufactured in Indonesia

This B-stock unit retains full specification compliance while offering significant savings—a complete extended-range instrument with professional active electronics and refined playability for serious five-string players.

item.title: Schecter C-5 GT Bass Satin Charcoal Burst B-Stock 2742 — $959.20
item.description:
$959.20 · B-Stock · LV Guitars

Schecter C-5 GT Bass Satin Charcoal Burst B-Stock 2742

The C-5 GT is a precision 5-string instrument built for players who demand fast access across the entire fingerboard and articulate low-end response. The thin "C" neck profile and 35" scale length deliver comfortable reach without sacrificing definition, while the set-neck construction with Ultra Access cutaway opens up the upper register for extended playing. B-stock condition means it arrives with minor cosmetic blemishes, but full structural and tonal integrity.

Playability & Construction

The 3-piece maple neck with carbon fiber reinforcement provides exceptional stability and minimal neck dive across the 35" extended scale. A Graph Tech Black Tusq XL nut at 1.771" width paired with 24 extra jumbo frets on a 16" radius ebony fingerboard enables fast lateral movement and clear articulation. The thin neck profile measures .787" at the first fret and .866" at the 12th, creating a modern feel that suits both aggressive picking and fluid finger techniques.

Tone & Electronics

Dual EMG 40DC (bridge) and EMG 40P5 (neck) pickups deliver focused, cutting tone with minimal noise—ideal for defined low-end and punchy mids. The 2-band EMG EQ system with independent volume and blend controls offers surgical frequency shaping without unnecessary complexity. A Schecter custom string-through bridge maximizes sustain and resonance across all five strings.

Key Features
  • Body: Mahogany with flamed maple top and black 1-ply binding
  • Neck: 3-piece maple with carbon fiber reinforcement rods, thin "C" profile
  • Scale length: 35" (889mm)
  • Fretboard: Ebony with 24 extra jumbo frets, 16" radius
  • Nut: Graph Tech Black Tusq XL, 1.771" width
  • Bridge pickups: EMG 40DC (bridge) and EMG 40P5 (neck)
  • Controls: Volume/Blend with 2-band EMG EQ
  • Bridge: Schecter custom bass bridge with string-through design
  • Hardware: Black finish with metal knurled knobs and set screws
  • Tuners: Schecter branded
  • Inlays: Offset/reverse Roman numerals
  • Battery: 9-volt clip-in compartment

This C-5 GT combines refined ergonomics, EMG clarity, and extended low-end reach—a serious workhorse for players pushing into extended range and high-definition tone.

item.title: Schecter C-5 GT Bass Satin Trans Purple B-Stock 2624 — $989
item.description:
$989 · B-Stock · LV Guitars

Schecter C-5 GT Bass Satin Trans Purple B-Stock 2624

This unplayed C-5 GT five-string delivers a slim, responsive playing experience defined by its thin "C" neck profile and extended 35" scale—design choices that make fast, articulate extended-range work feel natural rather than demanding. The set-neck construction anchors a resonant mahogany body with flamed maple top, yielding both visual presence and focused tonal character across all five strings. B-stock pricing reflects only minor cosmetic marks on an otherwise excellent instrument with full manufacturer warranty.

Playability & Construction

The 3-piece maple neck with carbon fiber reinforcement rods resists flex and provides stable intonation under tension, while the 35" scale paired with 24 X-Jumbo frets and 16" radius ebony fretboard creates a fast, articulate playing surface suited to percussive attack and technical precision. Neck access via heel truss rod adjustment and the Graph Tech XL Black Tusq nut (1.771" width) ensure stable tuning and clarity across all five strings, with neck thickness of .787" at the 1st fret and .866" at the 12th fret offering a slim, comfortable grip.

Tone & Electronics

The EMG 40DC bridge and EMG 40P5 neck pickups deliver punchy, articulate bass tones with controlled dynamics, while volume control, blend potentiometer, and 2-band EMG active EQ provide real-time sculpting from aggressive low-end definition to bright, focused mids and highs. The Schecter Custom Bass Bridge with string-thru design and black hardware maximizes sustain and tonal transfer to the body.

Key Features
  • Body: Mahogany with arched flamed maple top, Satin Trans Purple finish
  • Set-neck construction with Ultra Access and black 1-ply binding
  • 3-piece maple neck with carbon fiber reinforcement rods
  • Thin "C" neck shape; .787" thickness at 1st fret, .866" at 12th fret
  • 35" scale (889mm) with 24 X-Jumbo frets and 16" radius ebony fretboard
  • Graph Tech XL Black Tusq nut, 1.771" width
  • EMG 40DC bridge pickup and EMG 40P5 neck pickup
  • Volume/Blend controls with 2-band EMG active EQ
  • Schecter Custom Bass Bridge, string-thru design with black hardware
  • Schecter tuners with 2-way heel-access truss rod
  • Offset/Reverse Roman Numeral inlays with side dot markers
  • Includes Ernie Ball 5 String Super Long (.045–.130) strings

This is a premium extended-range instrument engineered for precision and responsive dynamics, offered at significant B-stock discount with cosmetic imperfections that do not affect playability, tone, or structural integrity.

item.title: Schecter Session Stiletto-4 Electric Bass Aged Natural Satin B-Stock — $559.20
item.description:
$559.20 · B-Stock · LV Guitars

Schecter Session Stiletto-4 Electric Bass Aged Natural Satin B-Stock

This Stiletto-4 delivers a comfortable, balanced feel in the hands with its 'C'-shaped maple neck and 34" scale that accommodates both precision and reach. The Aged Natural Satin finish reveals the beautiful grain of the swamp ash body, while the bolt-on construction keeps the instrument responsive and lively. Note: This is B-stock with a minor scratch on the back of the neck—a cosmetic issue that does not affect playability or sound.

Playability & Build

The neck measures .826" at the first fret and .905" at the 12th fret, providing a moderate grip that suits most hand sizes. 24 Narrow X-Jumbo frets paired with a 12" fretboard radius enable smooth lateral movement and clean intonation across the board. The Graph Tech XL Black Tusq nut (1.496" width) ensures solid string spacing and clear note definition, while ebony side block inlays mark fret positions with understated elegance.

Electronics & Tone

The 18-volt active electronics system features dual EMG-designed pickups—EMG 35J at the neck and EMG 35DC at the bridge—delivering articulate, punchy tone with extended dynamic range. A 3-band active EQ with master volume and blend controls grants surgical control over low-end depth, midrange presence, and high-end clarity, making this bass equally at home in tight studio sessions or live settings.

Key Features
  • Body Material: Swamp Ash
  • Neck & Fretboard: One-piece Maple construction
  • Scale: 34" (863mm)
  • Frets: 24 Narrow X-Jumbo
  • Neck Shape: 'C' (0.826" @ 1st fret, 0.905" @ 12th fret)
  • Fretboard Radius: 12" (305mm)
  • Nut: Graph Tech XL Black Tusq, 1.496" width
  • Pickups: EMG 35J (neck) and EMG 35DC (bridge), 18-volt active system
  • Electronics: 3-Band active EQ with master volume and blend control
  • Bridge: Schecter Custom Bass String Thru design with black hardware
  • Tuners: Schecter
  • Inlays: Ebony side blocks
  • Construction: Bolt-on, right-handed, manufactured in South Korea

This Session Stiletto-4 combines efficient ergonomics with professional-grade active electronics and quality components, making it a practical choice for players seeking dependable performance without compromise.

This specific B-Stock unit features a minor cosmetic imperfection: a scratch on the back of the neck. This mark is purely superficial and has absolutely zero impact on the playability, tone, or structural integrity of the bass. Get a premium Schecter Session Stiletto-4 at a significant B-Stock discount while enjoying full manufacturer warranty coverage.

item.title: Fender American Vintage II '66 Jazz Bass — $1,850
item.description:
$1,850 · Very Good · Twin Cities Rhythm

This 2025 AVII bass has seen only a few hours use. The condition is mint with the exception of 3 small blemishes in the nitro finish so I had to reduce the condition grade. Please see relevant pics. Purely cosmetic and pretty much invisible from a few feet away. Neck and frets are flawless. I have reduced the price accordingly and will respond to reasonable offers but anything ridiculous will be ignored. Comes with the OHSC featuring covers which were never installed and the factory papers and foam mute. It's truly a stunning instrument and plays like butter. I have it setup with new Ian Martin Allison signature strings.

The Fender® American Vintage II series presents a remarkably accurate take on the revolutionary designs that altered the course of musical history. Built with period-accurate bodies, necks and hardware, premium finishes and meticulously voiced, year-specific pickups, each instrument captures the essence of authentic Fender craftsmanship and tone.

Alder

Body Finish

Gloss Nitrocellulose Lacquer

Body Material

Alder

Body Shape

Jazz Bass®

Body Style

Solid Body

ElectronicsBridge Pickup

Pure Vintage '66 Single-Coil Jazz Bass®

Controls

Volume 1. (Middle Pickup), Volume 2. (Bridge Pickup), Master Tone

Middle Pickup

Pure Vintage '66 Single-Coil Jazz Bass®

Pickup Configuration

SS

Switching

None

GeneralColor

Sea Foam Green

Orientation

Right-Hand

Product Name

American Vintage II 1966 Jazz Bass®, Rosewood Fingerboard, Sea Foam Green

Series

American Vintage II

HardwareBridge

Pure Vintage 4-Saddle with Threaded Steel Saddles

Bridge Cover/Tailpiece

Includes Chrome Bridge Cover

Bridge Mounting

5-Screw Vintage-Style

Control Knobs

Black Plastic

Hardware Finish

Nickel/Chrome

Neck Plate

4-Bolt with "F" Logo, Serialized

Pickguard

4-Ply Tortoiseshell

Pickup Covers

Black

Strap Buttons

Vintage-Style

String Trees

Vintage-Style Disc

Strings

Fender® USA 7250M Nickel Plated Steel (.045-.105 Gauges), PN 0737250406

Tuning Machines

Pure Vintage ‘Lollipop’

MeasurementsFret Size

Vintage Tall

Scale Length

34" (864 mm)

MiscellaneousStyle

2 Single-Coil

NeckFingerboard Material

Bound Round-Laminated Rosewood

Fingerboard Radius

7.25" (184.1 mm)

Headstock

Jazz Bass®

Neck Binding

1-Ply White

Neck Construction

4-Bolt

Neck Finish

Gloss Nitrocellulose Lacquer

Neck Material

Maple

Neck Shape

1966 "U"

Number of Frets

20

Nut Material

Bone

Nut Width

1.5" (38.1 mm)

Position Inlays

White Pearloid Dot - 7 mm

Side Dots

Black

String Nut

Bone

Truss Rod

Vintage-Style Butt Adjust

Truss Rod Nut

Vintage-Style Butt Adjust

When Don Randall at Fender Sales requested a more sophisticated, high-end bass model, the now iconic Jazz Bass® was the result. The neck was narrower at the nut, providing a faster and more effortless feel and the sleek new body style mirrored the offset contoured style of the Jazzmaster®. By 1966, evolution of the instrument reached new heights with striking new features.

The American Vintage II 1966 Jazz Bass features a comfortable "U" shape hard rock maple neck, and it plays like a dream with a 7.25" radius round-lam rosewood fingerboard and vintage tall frets. Characteristic of production in 1966, this J-Bass® is offered with white neck binding, pearl dots, two volume controls with master tone, matching painted headstock and 4-ply tortoiseshell pickguard. The 4-saddle bridge with threaded saddles, vintage-style "lollipop" tuners and Pure Vintage '66 Jazz Bass pickups deliver classic thump and style.

The instruments in the American Vintage II series are direct descendants of the original Fenders: designed for players with a fine appreciation for vintage Fender tone and feel and built with unmatched quality, down to the last screw. These are Fender electrics in their purest form: Fender American Vintage II, the stuff of legends.

Features

  • Alder Body
  • Gloss Nitrocellulose Lacquer Finish
  • Pure Vintage '66 Single-Coil Jazz Bass® Pickups
  • "U"-Shaped Neck Profile
  • Bound Round-Lam Rosewood Fretboard with Paint Matched Headstock
  • Pure Vintage 'Lollipop' Tuners

item.title: Fender Blacktop Precision Bass 2013 - Black — $695
item.description:
$695 · Very Good · Don’s Gear Locker

2013 Fender Blacktop Precision Bass. Very good condition. About 9.5 pounds but well balanced. Passive electronics. Early version of High Mass Bridge. Electronics and Truss Rod systems have been fully tested. Everything works 100%. Nice and clean. There is overhead light reflections in some of the pictures. Normal Pickguard scratches from playing. Hardly and fretwear or marking. Smooth, very easy to play. No bag or case. Packed and ready to go, so no other pictures are available. Listing is open to the US Lower 48 Only! NO INTERNATIONAL SHIPPING! Sorry.

item.title: Yamaha TRBX304 4-String Bass 2010s White — $251
item.description:
$251 · Very Good · Jaden's Gear Locker

beautiful P-bass. lightly used, just recently fitted with new strings. selling cause im looking to switch to a jass bass. will remove sticker if you like.

item.title: Fender MIJ International Color Precision Bass 2022 - Morocco Red — $950
item.description:
$950 · Excellent · Twin Cities Rhythm

Fender Made in Japan Limited International Color Precision Bass - Morocco Red

This example is ultra lightweight : 7.8lbs!!!!

Bass has been professionally set up and tried but is effectively new. Comes with original gig bag and a free new-in-the-bag aftermarket pickguard made to fit this model- an $80 value!!!

Neck is a joy to play, slender and sort of in between a J neck and a P neck. Manufacturing quality control on this bass is off the charts- Fender Mexico pricing with at least as good or better than USA Fender quality. Sound is full and clear with nice roundness but still plenty of attack.

Fender Made in Japan Limited International Color Precision Bass Features: 

  • Limited colors that are named after world cities
  • Based off the Fender Made in Japan Traditional Series that was first released in the '80s 
  • Basswood body sets you up for classic P Bass tone and sustain
  • Vintage appointments and '70s-style specifications like Modern Logo, 4-saddle Vintage-style bridge, thumb rest, and vintage-style tuners 
  • 34-inch scale length, "U"-shaped neck, and 9.5-inch fingerboard radius make the maple neck supremely playable and comfortable
  • Vintage-Style Split single-coil makes for classic P Bass tones with plenty of musicality and realism

item.title: MTD US Custom Bass Norm Stockton Saratoga Signature 5-Clear to Blue Burst w/Birdseye Maple Fingerboard — $10,520
item.description:
$10,520 · Brand New · Music Force Global Networks

*Music Force is the Official Dealer of MTD based in Seoul.

*Feel free to message us for a better deal.

*Please Message us if the product is in stock before order.

*Buyer must be responsible for all custom taxes & duties of your country. We don’t know exactly about your country’s import laws so please contact your local customs office about this before order!


<Specification>

Model : MTD Norm Stockton Saratoga 5 

Finish : Clear to Blue Burst

Top : Quilt Maple Top 

Body : Alder

Neck & Fingerboard : Maple(Titanum reinforced bar insert) w/Birdseye Maple Fingerboard

Frets: 21

Scale: 35"

Matching Headstock   

Matching Truss Rod Cover  

Buzz Feitin Tuning System

Pickups : Bartolini Custom Splittable Double J

Preamp : Bartolini MT8 Preamp with Coil Cut Switches, Push/Pull Mid Frequency (250/400Hz)

Headmachine : Hipshot

Bridge : Hipshot

Knobs : Matching Wood Knobs

Other Option: Wenge Ramp (Removable)

item.title: 1972–73 Greco EB-350 SG Bass – MIJ Lawsuit Era – Long Scale (33.5”) — $760.04
item.description:
$760.04 · Very Good · WOLF GUITARS AUSTRALIA

Key Specs:

  • Model: Greco EB-350 (EB-3 style)
  • Year: 1972–1973
  • Scale Length: Approx. 33.5" (long scale)
  • Construction: Mahogany body, bolt-on neck, rosewood fingerboard
  • Pickups: Replacement bridge pickup fitted; original bridge pickup and original neck “mudbucker” included
  • Controls: 2 volume, 2 tone, 3-way switch
  • Hardware: Original tuners, chrome covers intact
  • Electronics: One pot replaced (original included)

Condition:
Good vintage condition with minor wear consistent with age. Veneer lifting slightly in cutaways but stable. Structurally sound.

Case:
Original hard case with vintage stickers.

Notes:

  • Scale length has been measured at approximately 33.5"
  • Less common long-scale EB-style Greco, offering more tension and clarity than typical short-scale versions

item.title: Fender Precision Bass 1970 - Sunburst with original case — $5,800
item.description:
$5,800 · Very Good · MuchaBass

1970 Fender Precision Bass with original case. Minor wear. Plays like a dream

item.title: Squier Classic Vibe 70’s Precision Bass — $350
item.description:
$350 · Good · Stevietakeiteasy

Squire Classic Vibe 70’s P Bass in black/black with maple neck and block inlay. Surprisingly light weight and in great shape.. some paint missing from the back of the guitar but it’s been sanded/buffed over so it’s smooth to the touch and shiny, no rough edges… there is a sticker over the serial number with another # I’m assuming this is a ‘factory 2nd’ maybe.. not sure. nice clean old school P bass that won’t break your back. Will come padded and in a gig bag (not original) thanks !!

item.title: Gibson Grabber 1973 - 1983 - Natural — $2,500
item.description:
$2,500 · Very Good · Luis's Pro Shop

Up for sale is this 1977 Gibson grabber bass! It’s got what you’re looking for the pick up that slides up and down and that awesome Gibson grabber tone

I was told it’s in 1977. Haven’t had a chance to verify it, but seems accurate to me.

Please look at the pictures closely. You will see somewhere on the frets

Just had this base restrung and set up by Erics Guitar shop in Van Nuys. If you don’t know who that is look it up chances are he’s worked on some of your favorite musicians gear


Hate to part with it, but I’ve come into some financial problems. I need to raise some cash.

Please let me know if you have any questions

item.title: Squier Classic Vibe '60s Precision Bass - Sonic Blue — $250
item.description:
$250 · Fair · Stevietakeiteasy

This Is a 2008 Squire Classic Vibe 60’s P Bass in sonic blue with rosewood board. previous owner removed the bridge cover (see photos for screw holes on sides of bridge) and also changed the pickguard, so no vintage hand-rest (see photo).

This is a very solid, fairly heavy P Bass that plays and sounds great, there are some noticeable dings left of pickguard that I tried to photo best I could, please refer to photos.. hardware has very slight pitting that I’m sure would clean right up. Nice solid bass with a nice clear on the headstock but satin on the neck , super Playable and not like the cheaper thin basses . Comes with gig bag

Will pad guitar , then put in a fender gig bag (not original) then pad before boxing.. thanks for looking

item.title: Yamaha BB 404 With Soft Gig Bag Bass Guitar — $299.99
item.description:
$299.99 · Very Good · Evolution Music - Logan Square

For your consideration...

A Yamaha BB 404 With Soft Gig Bag Bass Guitar in Very Good condition!

At Evolution Music of Logan Square, we attempt to highlight cosmetic defects (if any) by picturing every angle of every piece of gear so you know exactly what you are getting. We always picture any and all accessories too. What you see is what you will get so please check out the pictures! Everything we sell has been tested and is fully functional unless otherwise noted. We have a 5 star rating from 5000+ happy customers across our many locations. Please message us if you have any questions. We are always happy to help and will respond asap!

item.title: Ibanez SR405EPBDX Bass Mars Gold Metallic Burst B-Stock — $519
item.description:
$519 · B-Stock · Studio Gears

Ibanez SR405EPBDX Bass Mars Gold Metallic Burst B-Stock

The SR405EPBDX delivers the ergonomic responsiveness the SR line is known for, with a slim 5-piece Maple/Walnut neck and 34-inch scale that sits naturally in the player's hands. This 5-string configuration opens up lower register possibilities while maintaining the articulate, punchy character that defines modern active bass tone. The stunning Mars Gold Metallic Burst finish combined with premium gold hardware makes this B-Stock unit a visually commanding instrument at an exceptional value.

Playability & Construction

The neck joint is bolt-on for solid sustain and stability, while the 24 medium frets and 12-inch fingerboard radius provide fast, comfortable fretting action across extended passages. At 9 lbs 4 oz, the bass balances responsiveness with enough mass to deliver substantial low-end projection without fatigue during extended sessions.

Tone & Electronics

Dual PowerSpan Dual Coil pickups—one at the neck and one at the bridge—feed into a 3-band active EQ controlled by a 3-way Power Tap switch for sculpting everything from articulate highs to deep, focused lows. The Accu-cast B500 bridge with adjustable saddles ensures precise intonation and allows dial-in of string spacing and action to personal preference.

Key Features
  • 5-string configuration with 34-inch scale length
  • Nyatoh body with Poplar Burl top
  • 5-piece Maple/Walnut neck
  • Jatoba fretboard with 24 medium frets
  • 1.772-inch nut width
  • 12-inch fingerboard radius
  • Bolt-on neck joint
  • PowerSpan Dual Coil pickups (neck and bridge)
  • 3-band active EQ with 3-way Power Tap switch
  • Accu-cast B500 bridge with adjustable saddles
  • Mars Gold Metallic Burst finish with gold hardware
  • Weight: 9 lbs 4 oz

The SR405EPBDX combines refined construction, versatile electronics, and striking aesthetics to deliver a professional-grade 5-string bass suited to genres ranging from funk and fusion to modern rock and metal.

This specific B-Stock unit features minor cosmetic imperfections on the Mars Gold Metallic Burst finish. These marks are purely superficial and have absolutely zero impact on the playability, tone, or structural integrity of the bass. Acquire this premium Ibanez SR405EPBDX at a significant B-Stock discount while retaining complete manufacturer warranty coverage.

item.title: Fender American Performer Jazz Bass — $865
item.description:
$865 · Excellent · BMG Music

Lightly used Fender American Performer Jazz Bass. Awesome neck on this one, super fast. 2 piece alder body, all stock parts. Bought new a few years ago it's never left my house. A few very minor dings, the only one noticeable is on the tip of the headstock. Light scratches on the pickguard. Weighs 8.8lbs, ships in a padded gigbag.

item.title: Peavey Foundation — $199.99
item.description:
$199.99 · Fair · Too Much Time On My Handz

I don’t know if you want to call this a project or not… or play as is. It has one EMG pickup and a volume and a tone control. It all functions. A little beat up I suppose. I originally bought it to use the Peavey Pickups…. It will be shipped with the neck off. You will have out it on again to save on shipping. Thanks.

item.title: Lakland Skyline 55-60 Vintage J (Joe Osborn Signature) 2003 - Present - Natural — $1,250
item.description:
$1,250 · Excellent · StratAPalooza

Hello, for sale is my mint condition Lakland Skyline 55-60 Vintage J in Natural Finish.

I bought this bass brand new in April, from Zzounds. It underwent a full professional set up by Pat Wilkins. While at his shop, I had him swap out the original pickups for Seymour Duncan Apollos and Dunlop straplocks. The original Lakland pickups will be included. Other than to Pat's shop, it has never left the house and has been unplayed thus there is not a single ding, dent or scuff. The plastic wrap is still on the pickguard and control panel. This is a cool bass that needs to be played.

The bass did not come with a gig bag or case, so neither will this one.

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man StingRay 4 H with Rosewood Fretboard 1999 - 2018 - Blue Dawn — $1,999
item.description:
$1,999 · Very Good · Southern Music Gear

This is a very good condition Music Man Stingray Bass, in the rare and beautiful blue dawn finish. It sounds great and works perfectly. Includes a soft case.

Please feel free to ask any questions. Shipping to USA only. Local pickup is welcome. No trades, please.

item.title: Vintage DeArmond Bass Pickup Set — $299.99
item.description:
$299.99 · Very Good · Jerry's Sound

Vintage DeArmond Bass Pickup Set. One ring included. One has 7 inches of lead wire and the other one has 8 inches of lead wire.

item.title: Yamaha BB735A-DCS 5-String with Active Electronics 2010s - Dark Coffee Sunburst — $585
item.description:
$585 · Excellent · Matthew's Gear Garage

Wonderful yamaha bb735a! One owner. It’s a little over a year old. Only played at home. has Labella low tension flats on it right now. Comes with a world tour gig bag. Ships in reverb box! I’m switching to a passive five string. Make this bass yours!

We have a 5 star rating from 5000+ happy customers across our many locations. Please message us if you have any questions. We are always happy to help and will respond asap!

item.title: Ibanez GSRM20-BK — $209.44
item.description:
$209.44 · Brand New · Music World Brilon

Ibanez - GSRM20 - BK Mikro

  • Korpus: Pappel
  • Hals: Ahorn
  • Halsprofil: GSRM4
  • Griffbrett: Jatoba

item.title: Ibanez EHB1005F-AOM Bass Workshop 2023 - Present - Arctic Ocean Matte — $1,125
item.description:
$1,125 · Excellent · Super Duper 's Gear

Ibanez EHB1005F – Arctic Ocean Matte – Headless 5-String Fretless Bass – Mint Condition – w/ Original Ibanez Gig Bag

Super Duper Gear – Curating High-End, Vintage & Collectible Instruments
Houston, TX | Worldwide Shipping | Se habla Español

The Ibanez EHB1005F is a cutting-edge headless fretless bass designed for modern players who demand exceptional ergonomics, lightweight construction, and uncompromising performance. As part of Ibanez’s acclaimed Ergonomic Headless Bass (EHB) series, the EHB1005F combines innovative engineering with premium materials to create an instrument that feels effortless whether you’re on stage, in the studio, or practicing for hours.

Finished in the striking Arctic Ocean Matte (AOM), this fretless model offers incredible sustain, expressive articulation, and smooth playability. Its chambered body reduces weight without sacrificing resonance, while the multi-piece roasted maple and walnut neck provides outstanding stability and a fast, comfortable playing experience.

Equipped with Bartolini BH2 pickups and an active Vari-Mid 3-band EQ, the EHB1005F delivers a wide range of tones—from warm, singing fretless growl to articulate modern punch—making it ideal for jazz, fusion, gospel, progressive rock, R&B, and contemporary music.

This bass is in Mint Condition and includes the original Ibanez gig bag.

Specs & Features

  • Model: Ibanez EHB1005F
  • Finish: Arctic Ocean Matte (AOM)
  • Strings: 5
  • Headless Ergonomic Design
  • Fretless Fingerboard
  • Chambered American Basswood Body
  • Roasted Maple / Walnut 5-Piece Neck
  • Roasted Birdseye Maple Fingerboard
  • Luminescent Side Dot Inlays
  • Scale Length: 34”
  • Pickups: Bartolini BH2 Humbuckers
  • Electronics: Ibanez Custom Vari-Mid 3-Band EQ
  • EQ Bypass Switch
  • Passive Tone Control (Passive Mode)
  • MR5HS Mono Rail Bridge
  • Schaller S-Locks Strap Locks
  • Black Hardware
  • Original Ibanez Gig Bag Included

Condition

  • Mint Condition
  • Minimal to no signs of use
  • Electronics fully functional
  • Neck is straight and stable
  • Fingerboard is exceptionally clean
  • No cracks, breaks, or structural repairs

Why This EHB1005F?

  • Innovative headless ergonomic design
  • Professional fretless 5-string configuration
  • Lightweight chambered body
  • Roasted maple/walnut neck
  • Bartolini BH2 pickups
  • Active Vari-Mid EQ with passive bypass
  • Original Ibanez gig bag included
  • Mint condition

The Future of the Modern Bass

The EHB Series has quickly become one of Ibanez’s most celebrated modern bass platforms. By combining ergonomic design, premium tonewoods, innovative hardware, and professional electronics, the EHB1005F offers a playing experience unlike traditional basses. The fretless version adds a new level of musical expression, making it an outstanding choice for players seeking fluid slides, singing sustain, and exceptional tonal nuance.

Important Notice
Please review all photos carefully. We have done our best to accurately document the condition of this instrument. Additional high-resolution photos are available upon request.

What You See Is What You Get

The bass and original Ibanez gig bag shown in the photos are the exact items you will receive. No stock images are used. Please review all photos carefully before purchasing.

Ask Before You Order

Feel free to contact us with any questions regarding condition, specifications, or setup.

Follow Super Duper Gear for boutique, vintage, and collectible instruments shipped worldwide from Houston, Texas.

https://reverb.com/shop/super-duper-s-boutique

item.title: Squier Affinity Jazz Bass 6 string - Flat pink — $333
item.description:
$333 · Good · Bees Wax

Affinity six string bass modified with flat pink paint, and body is drilled with holes under the guard. Only top is painted. The fingerboard was stained black. The control plate is black aluminum and electronics are stock

Strings are Warwick black label stainless steel.

item.title: Ibanez GSR100EX-MOL — $229.99
item.description:
$229.99 · Brand New · Lee's Music

Ibanez GSR100EX-MOL – Mahogany Oil Simplicity with Solid Bass Power

The Ibanez GSR100EX-MOL combines classic tone & modern simplicity in a beautifully understated Mahogany Oil finish. As part of the Ibanez Soundgear family, this bass delivers pro-level performance in a stripped-down, affordable package.

Featuring a lightweight Poplar body, sleek GSR maple neck, & smooth Jatoba fretboard, the GSR100EX feels fast & balanced. A single PPD4 passive humbucking pickup provides thick, punchy tone—perfect for rock, funk, or metal—with simple volume & tone controls to keep you focused on playing.

The stable B10 bridge ensures solid intonation, while medium frets offer comfortable playability for any style.

Key Features:

  • Mahogany Oil Finish – classic & natural aesthetic

  • Poplar Body – lightweight, resonant, & balanced

  • GSR Maple Neck – fast-playing & comfortable

  • PPD4 Passive Bridge Pickup – full, aggressive tone

  • B10 Bridge – consistent tuning & sustain

  • Jatoba Fretboard with Medium Frets – smooth & responsive

  • Chrome Hardware – durable & stylish

A perfect blend of simplicity, tone & comfort for beginner to intermediate bassists.

item.title: Partcaster P/J bass Geezer Butler EMG pickups w/case — $1,400
item.description:
$1,400 · Very Good · Noise Machines

Up for grabs is this partcaster P/J bass. It has a P body and a walnut J style neck. Includes Geezer Butler EMG pickups. Also includes case that is definitely worn, missing a latch but does the job. Free shipping in US or local pickup in Austin is fine. Please message any questions or concerns. Thanks.

item.title: Epiphone Bass - Tobacco sunburst — $600
item.description:
$600 · Very Good · Action Sound

Here for your consideration this cool Epiphone Thunderbird 60's Bass. It has mahogany wings , a 7 piece walnut/mahogany neck and a Indian Laurel neck.

It is used but hard to see any use on it, Comes with Epiphone hard shell case.

Shipped UPs insured

item.title: Yamaha RBX250 4-String Electric Bass Natural Finish w/ Rosewood Fingerboard — $299
item.description:
$299 · Very Good · Golden Tone Emporium

Up for sale is a Yamaha RBX250 4-string electric bass in its original Natural finish. Built in Taiwan during the early 1990s, the RBX250 has earned a reputation as one of Yamaha's most dependable and comfortable basses, offering excellent playability and classic P/J pickup versatility.

The bass features a lightweight contoured body, comfortable maple neck, rosewood fingerboard with dot inlays, split Precision-style neck pickup paired with a Jazz-style bridge pickup, and passive Volume/Tone controls that provide a wide range of usable tones. Whether you're playing rock, blues, jazz, funk, or worship music, this bass delivers the reliable Yamaha quality players have trusted for decades.

The neck is straight, the electronics function properly, and the bass plays well up and down the neck.

Specifications

  • Brand: Yamaha
  • Model: RBX250
  • Year: Circa 1991–1995
  • Made in Taiwan
  • Finish: Natural
  • Body: Solid wood
  • Neck: Maple
  • Fingerboard: Rosewood
  • Scale Length: 34" (Long Scale)
  • Frets: 24
  • Pickups: Precision-style split pickup + Jazz-style bridge pickup (P/J)
  • Electronics: Passive
  • Controls: Volume, Tone
  • Bridge: Yamaha 4-saddle bridge
  • Serial Number: MH19091

Condition
Overall, the bass is in Very Good vintage condition. It has normal cosmetic wear from use, including light scratches, small dings, finish marks, and a few chips around the body edges and back of the neck as shown in the photos. None of the cosmetic wear affects playability or structural integrity.

Please review all photos carefully, as they are part of the description.

item.title: Ibanez SDB3 Sharlee D'Angelo Signature Bass Guitar — $800
item.description:
$800 · Excellent · GravityMusicGear

  • Make/Model: Ibanez SDB3 Sharlee D'Angelo Signature Bass
  • Serial Number: I241202802
  • Location of Manufacture: Indonesia
  • Scale Length: 34"
  • Nut Width: 1 11/16"
  • Weight: 8.6lbs
  • Finish Color: Pearl White
  • Pickup/Control Layout: B/N Ibanez PFR-B4 passive Pickups, Master volume / balancer / bass boost-cut / treble boost-cut
  • Neck Wood: Maple/Jatoba
  • Fingerboard Wood: Rosewood
  • Case: Does Not Include Case, but will be professionally packed and shipped
  • Features: 22 Frets, Cross Inlays, Gunmetal Hardware w/ Gotoh Diecast Tuning Machines
  • Condition: This is a fantastic bass in excellent condition throughout! No notable cosmetic blemishes or sign of use, not even pickmarks! Perhaps a thorough inspection will reveal proof somewhere that this is a used bass, but as far as I can tell this is pristine. The neck is straight and smooth, the fretboard is clean and the frets look excellent. The headstock is even free of the usual drummer-induced scrapes and scuffs! Please inspect photos carefully before purchase. All electronics have been tested and are in working condition. Everything which is included is pictured and is ready to be professionally packed and shipped.

07072026-12 KADG

item.title: Yamaha TRBX204 4-String Electric Guitar — $200
item.description:
$200 · Very Good · GravityMusicGear

  • Make/Model: Yamaha TRBX204
  • Serial Number: Y1809
  • Location of Manufacture: China
  • Scale Length: 34"
  • Nut Width: 1-9/16"
  • Weight: 7.4 lbs
  • Finish Color: Metallic Black
  • Pickup/Control Layout: N: P-Style Single Coil, B: J-Bass Single Coil, Volume, Volume, Tone, Tone
  • Neck Wood: Maple
  • Fingerboard Wood: Rosewood
  • Case: Does not include case but will be professionally packed and shipped.
  • Features: 24 Frets, White Dot Inlays, Chrome Hardware w/Stainless Sealed Tuning Machines
  • Condition: This is a cool 4-string bass! The top of the instrument looks good and is free of any egregious marks or blemishes. The knobs turn smoothly and the pickups sound good. The sides and back of the instrument have some minor handling marks but nothing I would consider egregious. The neck is straight and plays comfortably. The frets have some minor play marks but there is plenty of material left. The tuner works well and the headstock looks clean. This is a wonderful playing bass. As with any used instrument, it is possible I may have missed something during my inspection, as such we recommend carefully reviewing all photos before purchase. All electronics have been tested and are in working condition. Everything which is included is pictured and is ready to be professionally packed and shipped.

06192026-01 DGDK

item.title: Fender Player II Mustang Bass PJ - Cactus Gray - Free Shipping — $849.99
item.description:
$849.99 · Brand New · N Stuff Music

**Please Read Our Shop Policies

Step into the spotlight and experience iconic Fender sound and style with the Player II Mustang Bass PJ — a stage-ready bass guitar with contemporary updates to power your performance and inspire your playing.

The Player II Mustang Bass PJ radiates timeless Fender charm, but under the hood, it's primed for today's players. Everything about the neck is designed for fast and fluid playability, from the Modern “C”-profile with silky satin urethane finish on the back to the comfy 9.5”-radius slab rosewood or maple fingerboard with smooth rolled edges and 20 medium jumbo frets. A classic alder body is available in both timeless Fender finishes and never-before-seen colors unearthed from the archives. Player Series Alnico V Split-Coil P bass and Single-Coil J bass pickups offer sweet highs, growling mids and seismic lows that elevate any genre. The 3-way toggle switch lets you easily dial in everything this versatile pickup set has to offer, while an adjustable 4-saddle bridge, single-groove steel saddles and open-gear tuners ensure precise tuning stability for the flexibility to explore endless sonic possibilities.

Perfect for crafting your own sound, the Player II Mustang Bass PJ has the looks, tone and feel that only a Fender delivers.

SPECS:

BODY:
Body Material: Alder
Body Finish: Gloss Polyester
Body Shape: Mustang Bass
Weight: 9.00 lbs

NECK:
Neck Material: Maple
Neck Finish: Satin Urethane Finish on Back, Gloss Urethane Finish on Front
Neck Shape: Modern "C"
Scale Length: 30" (762 mm)
Fingerboard Material: Maple
Fingerboard Radius: 9.5" (241 mm)
Number Of Frets: 19
Fret Size: Medium Jumbo
String Nut: Synthetic Bone
Nut Width: 1.5" (38.1 mm)
Position Inlays: Black Dots

ELECTRONICS:
Bridge Pickup: Player Series Alnico 5 Single-Coil Jazz Bass
Middle Pickup: Player Series Alnico 5 Split Single-Coil Precision Bass
Controls: Master Volume, Master Tone
Switching: 3-Position Toggle: Position 1. Bridge Pickup, Position 2. Bridge and Middle Pickups, Position 3. Middle Pickup
Configuration: PJ

HARDWARE:
Bridge: 4-Saddle Standard
Hardware Finish: Nickel/Chrome
Tuning Machines: Fender Vintage-Style
Pickguard: 3-Ply Parchment
Control Knobs: Black Plastic with White Indicator
Neck Plate: 4-Bolt with "F" Logo

MISCELLANEOUS:
Strings: Fender USA 7250M Nickel Plated Steel (.045-.105 Gauges), PN 0737250406

ACCESSORIES:
Included Accessories: Saddle Height & Truss Rod Wrench

item.title: Fender Standard Jazz Bass - Aqua Marine Metallic - Free Shipping — $679.99
item.description:
$679.99 · Brand New · N Stuff Music

**Please Read Our Shop Policies

Launched by Fender in 1960 and positioned as a deluxe model to compliment the P Bass, the Jazz Bass provided jazzers with dual pickups for added sonic variety and brightness, a more ergonomic offset-waist body, and a slim neck shape that invited fast, agile performance.

Built to accompany players on their formative musical adventures, the Fender Standard Jazz Bass delivers the approachable playability and inspiring tone that made Fender an icon of rock & roll. Powered by a set of Fender Standard pickups for high-output sonic character and an inviting “Modern C”-shaped neck for superior playing comfort, this J Bass truly sets the standard for the Fender experience.

SPECS:

BODY:
Body Material: Poplar
Body Finish: Gloss Polyurethane
Body Shape: Jazz Bass
Weight: 8.90 lbs

NECK:
Neck Material: Maple
Neck Finish: Satin Urethane with Gloss Urethane Headstock Face
Neck Shape: Modern "C"
Scale Length: 34"
Fingerboard Material: Maple
Fingerboard Radius: 9.5"
Number Of Frets: 20
Fret Size: Medium Jumbo
String Nut: Micarta
Nut Width: 1.5"
Position Inlays: Black Dots

ELECTRONICS:
Bridge Pickup: Standard Single-Coil Jazz Bass
Neck Pickup: Standard Single-Coil Jazz Bass
Controls: Volume 1. (Neck Pickup), Volume 2. (Bridge Pickup), Master Tone
Switching: N/A
Configuration: SS

HARDWARE:
Bridge: Standard Top-Load with Satin Chrome Steel Barrel Saddles
Hardware Finish: Chrome
Tuning Machines: Fender Standard Open-Gear with Clover Keys
Pickguard: 3-Ply White
Control Knobs: Black Plastic
Neck Plate: 4-Bolt

MISCELLANEOUS:
Strings: Nickel Plated Steel (.045-.105 Gauges)

item.title: Fender American Standard Jazz Bass with Maple Fretboard 1997 - 2000 - Black — $1,299
item.description:
$1,299 · Very Good · Bond Street Guitars

This 1997 Fender American Standard Jazz Bass features a 2-piece alder body in Fender's classic black finish. During the 1990's, Fender was pairing the American Standard line with a pretty slim "C' neck profile, and this particular neck has a nut width of 1.51" with a fair amount of shoulder that begins to taper out starting at the 5th fret. The maple neck has a good amount of wave in the grain that helps compliment the tapered neck profile. This 1997 American Standard Jazz bass is in very good condition. The body shows dings, dents, and scratches across. Please send a message with any questions or to request more photos.

item.title: Gould GB50CRM Princeton Bass Guitar, Cream — $237.86
item.description:
$237.86 · Brand New · Stompbox London

Specifications

  • Body: Poplar
  • Neck: Canadian Maple (Bolt-On)
  • Fingerboard: Laurel
  • Hardware: Chrome
  • Machineheads: Open Gear
  • Scale Length: 864mm
  • Pickups: P
  • Controls: 1 x Volume, 1 x Tone

The Gould Princeton bass is the ideal choice if you’re looking to kickstart your bass-playing journey or add a budget-friendly bass to your collection. With a Canadian maple neck and laurel fingerboard, this Gould Princeton bass provides a smooth and comfortable playing experience, making it perfect for beginner bassists.

The P/J pickups deliver a wide array of punchy and warm tones, allowing players to explore a range of styles and genres.

The lightweight poplar body ensures comfort during long practice sessions and makes handling the instrument easier for players of all ages, whether at home or on stage.

item.title: Lakland Skyline series DJ-4 Darryl Jones Signature Bass — $1,400
item.description:
$1,400 · Excellent · Action Sound

Here is a very nice Lakeland Skyline DJ-4 series Darryl Jones Signature bass guitar. This has passive electronics with custom-wound pickups designed for a vintage sound. I sold this one a while back and it was traded back in due to cash flow problems.

It has a nicely contoured body, rosewood fretboard and their unique headstock shape. It has a small bump at the bottom of the body , see picture. all in all a killer bass in great shape with not much playing time.

Shipped UPS insured .

item.title: Jones SM1 5 String Bass, Brown Walnut and Maple Body, Made in England, W/Case — $3,750
item.description:
$3,750 · Excellent · Haight Ashbury Music Center

Jones SM1 5 String Electric Bass, Brown Walnut and Maple Body, Natural Finish, Boutique Handmade in England, W/Case

Gorgeous UK-Made 5-Stringer. Dialed in and set up in-shop, plays great with low action and no issues. All original and very clean; no signs of abuse and hardly any signs of use. Includes Gator hardshell case.

Description:

The Jones SM1 5-String Bass is a handcrafted boutique instrument built in New Forest, England, inspired by the legendary British and American boutique basses of the late 1970s and 1980s. Designed for players seeking premium craftsmanship without compromise, the SM1 combines classic boutique aesthetics with modern engineering and exceptional playability.

Built around a five-piece maple and walnut neck, the SM1 offers outstanding stability and comfort, complemented by a 20-inch radius fingerboard for a fast, effortless playing experience. Carefully selected tonewoods provide excellent resonance, balance, and sustain.

The instrument is equipped with hand-wound custom pickups that deliver a rich, articulate voice with deep, focused lows, warm mids, and clear, sparkling highs. Its balanced frequency response makes it equally at home in jazz, funk, rock, fusion, and modern session work. A pronounced yet musical midrange allows the bass to cut through the mix while retaining clarity and dynamic expression. When pushed, the SM1 develops a powerful, organic growl without sacrificing note definition.

Inspired by boutique classics from makers such as Wal, Jaydee, Alembic, Ken Smith, and Fodera, Jones Basses continues the tradition of hand-built British craftsmanship with instruments designed to meet the demands of today's professional bassist.

Features:

Handmade Jones/Armstrong Humbuckers

Flexcore Pope 3 band EQ (Vol push/pull Active/Passive), Blend, Bass, Mid, Treble

No-Screw Matching Control Panel, Magnetic!

Hand-Wound Original Jones Pickups


Fretboard:

34″ Scale

24 Frets

Rosewood fretboard

Jescar 47095SS stainless steel fretwire

20″ Radius


Neck:

5 piece flamed Maple neck-through construction

with Walnut stringers

2 x Carbon fibre reinforcement rods

3000 year old Bog Oak (front) & Walnut (Back) headstock veneer.


Body:

Flamed Walnut top and back

Maple core


Hardware:

Jones 18mm Brass Bass Bridge

Gold Gotoh GB350 Res-o-lite Tuners

Gold Dunlop flush mount Straplocks

Tedur Just-a-Nut III


Finish:

Hand rubbed oil & wax

item.title: Fender American Professional II Jazz Bass Fretless 2020 - Present - 3-Color Sunburst — $1,199
item.description:
$1,199 · Good · Bond Street Guitars

You've been around the block I'm sure. You know you want class, and what's classier than a modern take on a true American classic? It's got GORGEOUS V-mod II single coil pickups giving you a more articulate and punchy tone than that of its processors but with the same sound we know and love. A modern C neck with that same fast and tight width that makes traversing this fretless wonder a total breeze. Well taken care of and well-loved, this bass is a beaut, and one you really just can't go wrong with.

Please send an email with any questions or to request more photos.

item.title: Fender American Deluxe Jazz Bass with Maple Fretboard 1999 - 2009 - 3-Color Sunburst — $1,199
item.description:
$1,199 · Very Good · Bond Street Guitars

Offset double-cutaway, select alder body, bolt-on maple C-Shaped neck with graphite reinforcements, 22-fret maple fingerboard with pearl dot inlays and two single coil Noiseless pickups making for a great and reliable vintage (yes 2001 is vintage now) Fender Jazz Bass.

Some dings here and there but overall great condition. Please send an email with any questions or to request more photos.

item.title: Fender Player II Precision Bass Cactus Gray Rosewood Fingerboard — $849.99
item.description:
$849.99 · Brand New · Fuller's Guitar

- Fender Authorized Dealer - This item is Brand New with Full Factory Warranty.

- The photos shown are of the actual instrument being sold.

- Our luthiers at Fuller's Guitar thoroughly inspect and set up each instrument (to factory spec action and neck relief) prior to shipping to make sure that your new instrument is gig-ready right out of the box.

- Buy risk-free with our 14 day return policy (full refund, less shipping). Check out our shop policies for more details.

Item shown:
Player II Precision Bass®, Rosewood Fingerboard, Cactus Gray
Model #:
0140470597
UPC #:
885978997169
Case/Gig Bag:
(Not Included)

Serial # MXA26002281
8lbs 14oz

Step into the spotlight and experience iconic Fender® sound and style with the Player II Precision Bass® — a stage-ready bass guitar with contemporary updates to power your performance and inspire your playing.

The Player II Precision Bass radiates timeless Fender charm, but under the hood, it's primed for today's players. Everything about the neck is designed for fast and fluid playability, from the Modern “C”-profile with silky satin urethane finish on the back to the comfy 9.5”-radius slab rosewood or maple fingerboard with smooth rolled edges and 20 medium jumbo frets. A classic alder body is available in both timeless Fender finishes and never-before-seen colors unearthed from the archives. Player Series Alnico V Split-Coil P bass® pickups offer sweet highs, musical mids and seismic lows that elevate any genre. An adjustable 4-saddle bridge, single-groove steel saddles and open-gear tuners ensure precise tuning stability for the flexibility to explore endless sonic possibilities.

Perfect for crafting your own sound, the Player II Precision Bass has the looks, tone and feel that only a Fender delivers.

Features
Contoured Alder Body
Modern "C" Neck Profile
9.5“-Radius Maple or Rosewood Fingerboard with Rolled Edges
Player Series Alnico V Split-Coil Precision Bass® Pickups
4-Saddle Bridge with Single-Groove Steel “Barrel” Saddles
Open-Gear Tuning Machines

item.title: 1966 Mosrite Joe Maphis Model Bass Natural — $1,839
item.description:
$1,839 · Very Good · Thunder Road Guitars

Up for sale is a sleek and great sounding 1966 Mosrite Joe Maphis Model Bass in its original natural finish. This example is in great shape and is entirely original including the Mosrite branded tuning keys and knobs. Overall in very good condition less some scatterer play wear and finish checking surrounding most of the body. Super cool and fun bass! 

Pro Setup in house and ships with its original hardshell case

Weight: 8lbs. 7oz.

NOTE TO OUR VALUED CUSTOMERS:

We want you to be happy with your purchase and we try to represent the condition of all used and vintage guitars as accurately as possible in our listings.  Every used guitar shows some signs of play wear and vintage models even more so.  We call out all areas of damage or unusual wear, and describe the overall condition based upon what is "normal" for the age of the instrument.  Expect to see minor dings, finish checking, or other evidence of normal use and aging which may not be captured by photography or explicitly mentioned in the listing. 

We recognize that everyone has their own personal standard of what constitutes acceptable wear and tear.  If play wear is especially critical for you, please contact us at the Shop for a complete in-hand description and to answer any questions you may have.  Your satisfaction is of paramount importance to us.

item.title: KRAMER FOCUS 7000 WITH CASE — $661.76
item.description:
$661.76 · Very Good · Stang Guitars Inc.

This used Kramer FOCUS 7000 offers exceptional value with its comfortable contoured body, classic Blue finish, and reliable build. The dual passive pickups, maple neck, and rosewood fingerboard deliver a punchy, versatile tone ideal for various genres. With a 34-inch scale and 20 frets, it ensures smooth playability, making it a trustworthy option for both beginners and experienced players looking for classic Kramer quality at an affordable price.
